section_name: Opening of Bids; Acceptance or Rejection
text:
(a) Bids shall be opened and read at a public meeting of the governing body of a municipality.

(b) The governing body may:

(1) accept a bid it considers most advantageous to the owners of abutting property; or

(2) reject any or all bids.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 315. Artificial Lighting
##### § 315.044 — Opening of Bids; Acceptance or Rejection

(a) Bids shall be opened and read at a public meeting of the governing body of a municipality.

(b) The governing body may:

    (1) accept a bid it considers most advantageous to the owners of abutting property; or

    (2) reject any or all bids.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*
